name: mcp-gtags-server
description: Indexed C/C++ code navigation — GNU Global (gtags) lookups instead of grep scans, with automatic indexing.
long_description: Replaces grep-based code search with indexed lookups powered by GNU Global (gtags). Ask where a symbol is defined, who calls it, what a diff impacts — answered in milliseconds from an index that builds and refreshes itself. The gtags toolchain installs itself into ~/.gtags-mcp (user space, no sudo) on first use.

project_root.title: Project to index
project_root.description: The code repository the navigation tools operate on.
